## Summary

Describe the contribution and why it belongs in this repository.

## Contribution type

- [ ] New template
- [ ] New example
- [ ] Documentation improvement
- [ ] Worksheet or review tool
- [ ] Anti-pattern
- [ ] Maintenance

## Quality checklist

- [ ] Uses repository terminology consistently
- [ ] Focuses on product and design decisions, not implementation details
- [ ] Includes practical user controls where relevant
- [ ] Addresses trust risks and edge cases
- [ ] Uses relative Markdown links
- [ ] Does not duplicate existing content

## Reviewer notes

Add any questions, tradeoffs, or areas where feedback would be useful.
